headline: O’Reilly eyes $10bn bid for Genuine Parts’ auto unit – report
summary: Bloomberg reported that the division could be worth $10bn or more in any transaction, with an announcement on a potential sale possible by late summer.

headline: Genuine Parts (GPC) Moves 12.9% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Genuine Parts (GPC) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

headline: Genuine Parts (GPC) Stock Is Trending After Hours: Here's What You Should Know
summary: Genuine Parts Co. shares slipped 1.09% in after-hours trading after earlier surging 12.9% in regular session.
